{{Quote|My name is Jolan. Just a traveling pazaak player with no special story to tell.|Jolan to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />|translated=1}}
'''Jolan Aphett''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] who had been tutored in the game of [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] by [[Daoy]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was traveling around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] attempting to build up his pazaak deck so that he could be good enough to be in the championships. While attempting to make it on the tournament circuit, he met [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in [[Ahto City]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. Aphett turned aside Revan's inquiries into his past, dismissing his past as unimportant. They may have played a hand or two of pazaak before Revan moved on.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You're better than I am. I have to concede. I can't play against you if you always beat me like this. Here, take this. My old Pazaak mentor Daoy gave them to me when i started playing. Maybe they'll do you more good than they gave me.|Aphett after Revan defeated him in Pazaak multiple times|<ref name="KOTOR" />|translated=1}}
A [[Color/Legends|black]]-eyed and green-skinned [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]], Aphett traveled the galaxy looking to be challenged in Pazaak. After being defeated in Pazaak multiple times by Revan, Aphett considered Revan to be better than them at the game.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the PC version of the game, Jolan uses the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] soundset.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
